_comment_paths: Replace the two path fields below for your machine. See LAB_PC_SETUP_AND_RUN_GUIDE.md (section 7) for examples.
_comment_target: These point at one CUT inside testgen-lab; batch_runner.py overrides them per CUT.
_comment_model: Ollama model tag pulled via `ollama pull`. The 6.7B alternative is deepseek-coder:6.7b-base-q4_K_M.
_comment_prompts: prompt_profile selects the repair-stage template; generation_profile selects the initial-generation template (Appendix A in the thesis).
_comment_repair: max_repair_attempts is 5 in the main study and 15 in the budget-stress condition.
_comment_features: Pipeline feature toggles. Default values reproduce the ANSI-fixed configuration described in Chapters 3 and 4.
_comment_timeouts: Wall-clock timeouts for Maven and Ollama subprocesses (seconds).
